headline_seed: Micah Lasher Wins Manhattan Primary, Defeating Kennedy Heir and Others - The New York Times
draft_text:
Micah Lasher won the Democratic primary in NY-12, defeating Jack Schlossberg and a field that drew $26 million in advertising. NBC News and CBS News both project the Manhattan seat — vacated by Rep. Jerry Nadler — goes to Lasher.

And that's the mews.
